content: MessagePack: 3x faster serialization than JSON, 17.5% smaller payloads, no schema required, msgpackr is fastest JS impl. FlatBuffers: zero-copy deserialization (0.23ms vs 4.43ms for JSON), schema required, heavy serialization cost. Protobuf: smallest payloads (-45.6%), well-rounded. For high-frequency 60Hz sensor packets: MessagePack wins because serialization speed matters more than deserialization for fire-and-forget UDP-like packets. msgpackr works in modern browsers.
